metarubrics.name: Listed Cepheids with data
metarubrics.description: Did the model list Cepheid {cepheid_ID} in the list of Cepheids with measured redshift?

metarubrics.name: Did not list Cepheids without data
metarubrics.description: Did the model not include Cepheid {cepheid_ID} in the list with measured redshift?

metarubrics.name: Estimated redshifts
metarubrics.description: Did the model estimate that galaxy containing Cepheid variable {cepheid_ID} has redshift {z}, or stated value strictly inside the interval {z_allowed_interval}?

metarubrics.name: Estimated 'a'
metarubrics.description: Did the model estimate parameter 'a' as {a}, or value strictly inside interval {a_allowed_interval}?

metarubrics.name: Estimated 'sigma_a'
metarubrics.description: Did the model estimate uncertainty of parameter 'a' as {a_sigma}, or value strictly inside interval {a_sigma_allowed_interval}?

metarubrics.name: Estimated 'b'
metarubrics.description: Did the model estimate parameter 'b' as {b}, or value strictly inside interval {b_allowed_interval}?

metarubrics.name: Estimated 'sigma_b'
metarubrics.description: Did the model estimate uncertainty of parameter 'b' as {b_sigma}, or value strictly inside interval {b_sigma_allowed_interval}?
